languages.text: Новая группа разведки немедленно отправляется на место пропажи — и очень скоро выходит на связь с сообщением, что вокс-сигнал не пробивается через странный, матово-черный материал, покрывающий стены туннелей на определенной глубине. Также они докладывают, что внутри этих туннелей есть останки лагеря, по всей видимости, принадлежавшего имперской экспедиции.

A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.
languages.original_text: Новая группа разведки немедленно отправляется на место пропажи — и очень скоро выходит на связь с сообщением, что вокс-сигнал не пробивается через странный, матово-черный материал, покрывающий стены туннелей на определенной глубине. Также они докладывают, что внутри этих туннелей есть останки лагеря, по всей видимости, принадлежавшего имперской экспедиции.

traits.locale_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

languages.text: 失踪現場に新たな偵察隊が派遣され、すぐに報告が送られてきた。それは、ある深さのトンネルの壁を覆う、奇妙な黒光りのない物質によって、ヴォックス信号が遮断されているという報告である。また、そのトンネル内には、帝国探検隊のものと思われるキャンプ跡が見つかったという報告も送られてきた。
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

traits.locale_text: 失踪現場に新たな偵察隊が派遣され、すぐに報告が送られてきた。それは、ある深さのトンネルの壁を覆う、奇妙な黒光りのない物質によって、ヴォックス信号が遮断されているという報告である。また、そのトンネル内には、帝国探検隊のものと思われるキャンプ跡が見つかったという報告も送られてきた。

languages.text: Se envía un nuevo equipo de exploradores al lugar de la desaparición. Pronto llega un informe: la señal de voco está siendo bloqueada por el extraño material de color negro mate que cubre los túneles a partir de cierta profundidad. El informe también menciona los restos de un campamento, aparentemente perteneciente a una expedición Imperial.
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Se envía un nuevo equipo de exploradores al lugar de la desaparición. Pronto llega un informe: la señal de voco está siendo bloqueada por el extraño material de color negro mate que cubre los túneles a partir de cierta profundidad. El informe también menciona los restos de un campamento, aparentemente perteneciente a una expedición Imperial.

languages.text: 新的考察队立即被派往失踪地点。不久传来报告：隧道达到一定深度后，音阵信号会被墙壁上覆盖的一种奇异黑色哑光物质阻断。他们还汇报说，在隧道深处发现了一处营地遗迹，显然属于一支帝国考察队。
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: 新的考察队立即被派往失踪地点。不久传来报告：隧道达到一定深度后，音阵信号会被墙壁上覆盖的一种奇异黑色哑光物质阻断。他们还汇报说，在隧道深处发现了一处营地遗迹，显然属于一支帝国考察队。

languages.text: Sofort wird ein neues Erkundungsteam an den Ort ihres Verschwindens entsandt ... das wenig später meldet, dass ein seltsames, matt-schwarzes Material an den Wänden das Voxsignal ab einer bestimmten Tiefe blockiert. Sie berichten, dass es in diesen Gängen die Überreste eines Lagers gibt, das offenbar von einer imperialen Expedition errichtet wurde.
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Sofort wird ein neues Erkundungsteam an den Ort ihres Verschwindens entsandt ... das wenig später meldet, dass ein seltsames, matt-schwarzes Material an den Wänden das Voxsignal ab einer bestimmten Tiefe blockiert. Sie berichten, dass es in diesen Gängen die Überreste eines Lagers gibt, das offenbar von einer imperialen Expedition errichtet wurde.

languages.text: Kaybolma mahalline derhâl yeni bir keşif ekibi sevk ediliyor. Çok geçmeden belirli bir derinlikte tünel duvarlarını kaplayan tuhaf, mat siyah materyalin voks sinyalini engellediğini bildiriyorlar. Ayrıca bu tünellerin içinde görünüşe göre bir İmparatorluk keşif heyetine ait bir kampın kalıntıları olduğunu rapor ediyorlar.
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Kaybolma mahalline derhâl yeni bir keşif ekibi sevk ediliyor. Çok geçmeden belirli bir derinlikte tünel duvarlarını kaplayan tuhaf, mat siyah materyalin voks sinyalini engellediğini bildiriyorlar. Ayrıca bu tünellerin içinde görünüşe göre bir İmparatorluk keşif heyetine ait bir kampın kalıntıları olduğunu rapor ediyorlar.

languages.text: Une nouvelle équipe de reconnaissance est immédiatement envoyée sur place et indique que le signal vox est bloqué par l'étrange matériau noir mat recouvrant les parois des tunnels à une certaine profondeur. Ils rapportent également avoir trouvé les vestiges d'un campement, appartenant vraisemblablement à une expédition impériale.
languages.original_text: A new scouting team is immediately dispatched to the site of the disappearance — and very soon sends back a report that the vox-signal is blocked by the strange, matte-black material that covers the walls of the tunnels at a certain depth. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

Ils rapportent également avoir trouvé les vestiges d'un campement, appartenant vraisemblablement à une expédition impériale.
